series_metadata.series_title: ENFORCEMENT FILES: Final administrative adjudication materials.
series_metadata.series_description: These files contain adjudication materials related to administrative legal notices, hearings, report and recommendations, orders, orders on appeal, settlement agreements, and legal actions, judicial appeals, and judicial actions to enforce consumer finance laws and rules (including enjoining violations and enforcing subpoenas through court actions) for consumer finance licensees and registrants filed with the Division.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper copy in operating area until imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked for quality and completeness, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain electronic files for seven (7) years after the enforcement or litigation case is closed, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
